MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Rene Scott.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wanda Wycoff is present.
Attorney Joshua Cruz representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of FEB-14-2012 is vacated.
